name: SEO Analyzer API
description: Analyze any webpage for SEO factors including meta tags, headings, links, Open Graph, structured data, and get an overall SEO score with breakdown.
long_description:
## Overview

Comprehensive SEO Analyzer API that scores any public webpage on key SEO factors. Checks meta tags, heading structure, links, Open Graph, Twitter Card, structured data (JSON-LD), and returns an overall SEO score with detailed breakdown. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Features

- ✅ Overall SEO score (0-100) with per-factor breakdown
- ✅ Title, meta description, canonical, robots, and viewport analysis
- ✅ Heading structure audit (H1-H6 hierarchy)
- ✅ Internal and external link analysis with counts
- ✅ Open Graph, Twitter Card, and JSON-LD structured data detection

## Use Cases

- **SEO Auditing**: Quick on-page SEO health check for any URL
- **Competitor Analysis**: Compare SEO scores across competing pages
- **Automated Monitoring**: Track SEO score changes over time in CI/CD
- **Agency Reporting**: Generate SEO reports for client websites
- **Content Publishing**: Validate SEO before publishing new pages

## Quick Start

```
GET /analyze?url=https://example.com
```

Returns JSON with `score`, `title`, `meta_description`, `headings`, `links`, `og_tags`, `structured_data`, and recommendations.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 2,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier includes full SEO analysis and score. No credit card required.
